author: Mina
title: Late but okay
content: Delivery arrived two days late and the courier left the box outside, but the product works well.

author: Omar
title: Support loop
content: Customer support kept asking me to restart the device instead of addressing the broken charging case.

author: Leena
title: Worth it
content: The speaker feels durable, packaging was clean, and the sound quality is much better than expected.

author: Arjun
title: Overpriced
content: The product is fine but definitely too expensive for the battery life and build quality on offer.

author: Sara
title: Setup friction
content: The app setup failed three times and the instructions were confusing for first-time use.

author: Kabir
title: Refund took forever
content: The return was approved quickly but the refund process dragged on and support stopped replying.
